basics.name: Abdul Wahid
basics.label: Industry Research Fellow | Post-Doctoral Researcher
basics.summary: A computer scientist with expertise at the intersection of software systems, data-intensive architectures, and AI-enabled platforms. Research focuses on building robust, scalable, and interpretable computational systems, integrating software engineering principles, distributed systems, and machine learning. 20+ peer-reviewed papers (Citations 242, h-index 7).

work.name: Fidelity Investments, Ireland
work.summary: Industry Research Fellow in collaboration with FCAT, Fidelity Investments, funded through the Research Ireland Academic-Industry Postdoctoral Fellowship 2026.
highlights: Lead a project on market-level markers and temporal trends that best predict long-term forecasting accuracy, robustness, and stability of prediction markets.
Developing a knowledge graph-based representation of prediction markets to model agents, signals, events, incentives, and information flows.
Leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) for market summarisation, narrative extraction, and risk scoring, integrating Graph-RAG pipelines for explainable and verifiable analysis.

work.name: Data Science Institute, University of Galway
work.summary: Part of the E-governance research group at the Insight Centre for Data Analytics.
highlights: Co-lead the development of technological synergies, IPR frameworks, and ethical governance models for virtual worlds and immersive environments.
Developing LLMs, knowledge graphs, and ontologies to build interoperable and transparent digital ecosystems.
Collaborating across interdisciplinary teams to align AI-driven virtual environments with regulatory, ethical, and industry standards.

work.name: National College of Ireland
highlights: Design and deliver undergraduate Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Foundations modules.
Create original lectures, assignments, and assessments.
Integrate blended learning techniques and digital platforms to enhance accessibility and student success.

work.name: Technological University of Shannon
work.summary: Graduate-level course on autonomous vehicle sensor technologies and system architectures.
highlights: Designed and delivered a graduate-level course on autonomous vehicle sensor technologies.
Created original content including lectures, case studies (Tesla, Waymo, Cruise), and hands-on assignments.
Assessed students through practical implementation projects including ROS-based sensor fusion.

work.name: Data Science Institute, University of Galway
work.summary: Developed teaching and assessment materials, delivered lectures and tutorials across undergraduate and master's courses.
highlights: EE130 Fundamentals of Engineering (2019-2020)
EE224 Microprocessor Systems Engineering (2020-2021)
CT5105 Tools and Techniques for Large Scale Data Analytics (2023)
CT1111 Engineering Computing (2024)

work.name: Zerve AI, Dublin
work.summary: Worked on predictive and prescriptive data analytics projects.
highlights: Used machine learning to explore clients' data and provide insights and solutions.
Collaborated with clients to understand their specific needs and develop tailored solutions.
Developed and deployed ML models predicting vehicle sales velocity based on market dynamics.

work.name: Huawei Research, Dublin
work.summary: Part of the Cloud Core Network (CNN) team with focus on Digital Twin technology.
highlights: Research focused on modelling digital twin technology for cloud networks.
Investigated strategies to overcome limitations of current modelling languages.
AI-based code generation engines for modelling DT technology for telecommunication networks.

work.name: Yuncheng University, China
work.summary: Supported research projects and taught undergraduate courses.
highlights: Courses Taught: Digital Signal Processing, Computer Vision, Image Processing, Visual Basic (VB.NET)

courses: School of Electronics and Information Engineering

education.institution: Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University, India

awards.title: Research Ireland Academic-Industry Postdoctoral Fellowship
awards.summary: Highly competitive national fellowship supporting industry-aligned research with FCAT, Fidelity Investments.

awards.title: EDHI Funding Award (€60,000)
awards.summary: Co-PI on project titled 'Building a Recommender System for Technological Risk Management'.

awards.title: Science Foundation Ireland PhD Fellowship
awards.awarder: SFI / Confirm SFI Centre, University of Galway
awards.summary: Awarded SFI PhD Fellowship for doctoral research at University of Galway (2019–2023).

awards.title: Travel Grant
awards.summary: Travel grants awarded for presentations at international conferences.

projects.name: Multilingual Knowledge Alignment using LLMs and Knowledge Graphs
projects.summary: Developed a multilingual reasoning pipeline integrating transformer-based LLMs with domain-specific knowledge graphs to detect semantic drift across languages. Implemented using PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers, and Neo4j.
highlights: Horizon Europe project
PyTorch, Hugging Face, Neo4j

projects.name: Graph-RAG for Ethics and IPR in Virtual Worlds
projects.summary: Designed a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework combining structured knowledge graphs with generative LLMs to answer ethical and policy-related questions. Enhanced retrieval precision by 34% through hybrid symbolic-neural reasoning.
highlights: 34% improvement in retrieval precision
Hybrid symbolic-neural reasoning

projects.name: Digital Twin Simulation Pipeline
projects.summary: Modelled AI-driven digital twin environments for real-time cloud networks using distributed training and synchronisation across large datasets. Implemented with Azure ML and MLflow.
highlights: Huawei Research Ireland
Azure ML, MLflow
